evals.expected_output: A ~/.claude/agents/rag-evaluator.md file with XML-structured agent prompt: Role (mission + in/out scope), Why_This_Matters, Skill_Operating_Procedure (full hitgate workflow), Success_Criteria, Constraints (opinionated defaults), Output_Format (verdict-first). Model: claude-sonnet-4-6.

A ~/.claude/agents/decision-griller.md file. Role: Decision Griller persona. Skill_Operating_Procedure includes: map decision tree first, AskUserQuestion one fork at a time, 95% convergence stop, non-answer handling. Constraints: makes decisions without asking user for confirmation on obvious steps. Output_Format: verdict-first with resolved decisions.

evals.prompt: I want specialized agents for /rag-eval /xp /grill-with-options — forge all three
evals.expected_output: Three agent files created in parallel: rag-evaluator.md, xp-navigator.md, decision-griller.md. Each has distinct persona, self-contained procedure, opinionated defaults, and verdict-first output. Batch summary table reported.
